final:
module dram_cell (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire we,  
    input wire [3:0] data_in,  
    output reg [3:0] data_out,  
    input wire [1:0] addr  
);  
    reg [3:0] storage [0:3]; // 4-bit storage for 4 addresses  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (we) begin  
            storage[addr] <= data_in; // Write data to storage  
        end  
        else begin  
            data_out <= storage[addr]; // Read data from storage  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
